title: Finn & the Sea of Noise
overview: As Finn slips back into a groove of mindless parties, sunburn, and hangovers, he let's his life take a mind-numbing vacation. But when he's confronted with death first hand, he takes a new outlook on life, remembering his endless dreams and goals when he was young.  A micro-budget, DIY-minded, independent film incorporating elements from mumblecore and found footage cinema.
